chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1810 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 29.11.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Sohail o/b of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Abdul Razzak o/b of SHO Phuleli and ASI Muhammad Hanif Kumbhar SHO Pinyari. = Today, Mr. Fakhruddin Dahraj has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6 and has categorically made a statement that said respondent No.6-Zubair Chandrigar S/o Abdul Jabbar was a tenant in the premises owned by the petitioner and after termination of tenancy the said respondent No.6 handed over the premises to the petitioner and he neither in the past has caused any harassment to the petitioner nor wants to do so in future. On the contrary, petitioner is pressurizing respondent No.6 to pay the additional amount to the petitioner towards utility bills, which the respondent No.6 is not liable to pay. The police officials have filed their comments and they have also stated that no criminal case is registered in the matter against any of the parties and the dispute between the petitioner and respondent No.6 is of civil nature. This petition is disposed of with the directions that neither the petitioner nor respondent will cause any harassment to each other and if they have any grievance, the same shall be redressed through due process of law and not otherwise. JUDGE Shahid
